operand1.description: The first operand as a string to preserve precision.
operand1.title: Operand1

operand2.description: The second operand as a string to preserve precision.
operand2.title: Operand2

from_base.description: The base the number is written in (2–36).
from_base.title: From Base

number.description: The number to convert, written in the source base.
number.title: Number

height.description: The height (used by cylinder/cone volume and surface area).
height.title: Height

side.description: The side length of the cube.
side.title: Side

lower_limit.description: The lower limit of the definite integral.
lower_limit.title: Lower Limit

upper_limit.description: The upper limit of the definite integral.
upper_limit.title: Upper Limit

variable.description: The variable with respect to which integration is performed.
variable.title: Variable

equation.description: The first-order differential equation to solve.
equation.title: Equation

lower1.description: Inner lower limit (may depend on the outer variable).
lower1.title: Lower1

upper1.description: Inner upper limit (may depend on the outer variable).
upper1.title: Upper1

axis3.description: The third semi-axis (required for ellipsoid volume/surface area).
axis3.title: Axis3

semi_major.description: The semi-major axis of the ellipse.
semi_major.title: Semi Major

semi_minor.description: The semi-minor axis of the ellipse.
semi_minor.title: Semi Minor

variable.description: The variable with respect to which integration is performed.
variable.title: Variable

LabeledValue.description:
A single labelled row in a tabular result (e.g. a statistics summary or
a set of base conversions).
LabeledValue.title: LabeledValue

expression.description: The expression to take the limit of.
expression.title: Expression

variable.description: The variable that approaches the point.
variable.title: Variable

matrix1.description: The first matrix for the operation.
matrix1.title: Matrix1

matrix2.description: The second matrix for the operation.
matrix2.title: Matrix2

matrix.description: The square matrix to raise to a power.
matrix.title: Matrix

equations.description: A list of equations to solve.
equations.title: Equations

variables.description: A comma-separated list of variables to solve for.
variables.title: Variables

side1.description: The length of the first side.
side1.title: Side1

side2.description: The length of the second side.
side2.title: Side2

theta.description: The angle (in degrees) between the two sides.
theta.title: Theta

variable.description: The variable to differentiate with respect to.
variable.title: Variable

side.description: The edge length of the solid.
side.title: Side

solid.description: One of: tetrahedron, cube, octahedron, dodecahedron, icosahedron.
solid.title: Solid

sides.description: The number of sides of the polygon.
sides.title: Sides

number.description: The number to check for primality.
number.title: Number

number.description: The number to factorize into primes.
number.title: Number

count.description: The number of primes to generate.
count.title: Count

n.description: The position of the prime number to find.
n.title: N

base_area.description: The base area of the prism.
base_area.title: Base Area

base_perimeter.description: The base perimeter of the prism (required for surface area).
base_perimeter.title: Base Perimeter

max_hypotenuse.description: The maximum hypotenuse length for generating triples.
max_hypotenuse.title: Max Hypotenuse

height.description: The height of the rectangular prism.
height.title: Height

length.description: The length of the rectangular prism.
length.title: Length

width.description: The width of the rectangular prism.
width.title: Width

diagonal1.description: The length of the first diagonal.
diagonal1.title: Diagonal1

diagonal2.description: The length of the second diagonal.
diagonal2.title: Diagonal2

ScalarFieldRequest.description: A scalar function plus the variables it depends on (gradient, laplacian, hessian).
ScalarFieldRequest.title: ScalarFieldRequest

matrix.description: The matrix to scale or operate on.
matrix.title: Matrix

scalar.description: The scalar value for scaling the matrix.
scalar.title: Scalar

scalar.description: The scalar value for scaling the vector.
scalar.title: Scalar

equation.description: The equation to solve, with '=' separating the left and right sides.
equation.title: Equation

sample.description: Use the sample (n − 1) estimator. False uses the population (n) estimator.
sample.title: Sample

side.description: The side length of the square.
side.title: Side

base1.description: The length of the first base.
base1.title: Base1

base2.description: The length of the second base.
base2.title: Base2

height.description: The height of the trapezoid (required for area).
height.title: Height

leg1.description: The first non-parallel side (required for perimeter).
leg1.title: Leg1

leg2.description: The second non-parallel side (required for perimeter).
leg2.title: Leg2

base.description: The base length of the triangle.
base.title: Base

side1.description: The length of the first side.
side1.title: Side1

side2.description: The length of the second side.
side2.title: Side2

side3.description: The length of the third side.
side3.title: Side3

A.description: Angle opposite side a, in degrees (optional).
A.title: A

B.description: Angle opposite side b, in degrees (optional).
B.title: B

C.description: Angle opposite side c, in degrees (optional).
C.title: C

side1.description: The length of the first side.
side1.title: Side1

side2.description: The length of the second side.
side2.title: Side2

angle.description: The angle for the trigonometric operation.
angle.title: Angle

radians.description: Whether the angle is in radians. Defaults to True.
radians.title: Radians

operand.description: The operand for the operation as a string to preserve precision.
operand.title: Operand

VectorFieldRequest.description: A vector field (one expression per component) plus its variables.
VectorFieldRequest.title: VectorFieldRequest

matrix.description: The matrix to multiply with the vector.
matrix.title: Matrix

vector.description: The vector to multiply with the matrix.
vector.title: Vector

vector1.description: The first vector for the operation.
vector1.title: Vector1

vector2.description: The second vector for the operation.
vector2.title: Vector2

post.description:
Convert a number written in any base (2–36) to decimal, binary, octal and
hexadecimal.

Args:
    data (BaseConversion): The number and the base it is written in.

Returns:
    list[LabeledValue]: Label/value rows for each target base.

schema.title: Response Convert Base Api Bases Convert Post

post.description: Curl ∇×F of a 3-D vector field.

schema.title: Response Curl Api Calculus Curl Post

post.description: Directional derivative of f along a (normalised) direction vector.

schema.title: Response Directional Derivative Api Calculus Directional Derivative Post

post.description: Divergence ∇·F of a vector field.

schema.title: Response Divergence Api Calculus Divergence Post

post.description: Iterated double integral (inner variable first).

schema.title: Response Double Integral Api Calculus Double Integral Post

post.description: Gradient ∇f as a list of partial derivatives, one per variable.

schema.title: Response Gradient Api Calculus Gradient Post

post.description: Hessian matrix of second partial derivatives.

schema.title: Response Hessian Api Calculus Hessian Post

post.description: Jacobian matrix of a vector-valued function.

schema.title: Response Jacobian Api Calculus Jacobian Post

post.description: Laplacian ∇²f (sum of unmixed second partials).

schema.title: Response Laplacian Api Calculus Laplacian Post

post.description: Limit of an expression as a variable approaches a point.

schema.title: Response Compute Limit Api Calculus Limit Post

post.description: Compute a (possibly higher-order) partial derivative.

schema.title: Response Partial Derivative Api Calculus Partial Post

post.description: Taylor/Maclaurin series expansion to a given order.

schema.title: Response Taylor Series Api Calculus Taylor Series Post

post.description: Iterated triple integral (innermost variable first).

schema.title: Response Triple Integral Api Calculus Triple Integral Post

post.description:
Compute the definite integral of an expression over a range.

Args:
    data (DefiniteIntegralRequest): The input expression, variable, and limits for integration.

Returns:
    str: The definite integral of the expression over the specified range.

schema.title: Response Definite Integral Endpoint Api Cas Definite Integral Post

post.description:
Compute the derivative of an expression.

Args:
    data (ExpressionRequest): The input expression to differentiate.

Returns:
    str: The derivative of the expression.

schema.title: Response Derivative Endpoint Api Cas Differentiate Post

post.description:
Expand an algebraic expression.

Args:
    data (ExpressionRequest): The input expression to be expanded.

Returns:
    str: The expanded form of the expression.

schema.title: Response Expand Expression Endpoint Api Cas Expand Post

post.description:
Factor an algebraic expression.

Args:
    data (ExpressionRequest): The input expression to be factored.

Returns:
    str: The factored form of the expression.

schema.title: Response Factor Expression Endpoint Api Cas Factor Post

post.description:
Compute the indefinite integral of an expression.

Args:
    data (IntegralRequest): The input expression and variable for integration.

Returns:
    str: The indefinite integral of the expression.

schema.title: Response Indefinite Integral Endpoint Api Cas Integrate Post

post.description:
Simplify an algebraic expression.

Args:
    data (ExpressionRequest): The input expression to be simplified.

Returns:
    str: The simplified form of the expression.

schema.title: Response Simplify Expression Endpoint Api Cas Simplify Post

post.description:
Solve a first-order differential equation.

Returns:
    str: The solution to the differential equation.

schema.title: Response Solve Differential Endpoint Api Cas Solve Differential Post

post.description:
Solve a single-variable equation.

Returns:

schema.title: Response Solve Single Variable Endpoint Api Cas Solve Equation Post

post.description:
Solve a system of multivariable equations.

schema.title: Response Solve Multivariable Endpoint Api Cas Solve Multivariable Post

post.description:
Add two numbers with specified precision.

Args:
    data (ArithmeticOperation): Contains two operands as strings to preserve precision.
    precision (int, optional): The precision for the operation. Defaults to 100.

Returns:
    str: The result of the addition as a string.

post.description:
